package rulecoverage

import (
    "encoding/json"
)

// Negative scenario for json_unmarshal_same_payload_multiple_times: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same local JSON payload binding is unmarshaled into multiple targets in one function.
type envelope struct { ID string }

func NegativeJsonUnmarshalSamePayloadMultipleTimes(payload []byte) (envelope, error) {
    var first envelope
    err := json.Unmarshal(payload, &first)
    return first, err
}
